basic_details.job_title: MPPSC Assistant Town Planner Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 39 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Madhya Pradesh Public Service Commission (MPPSC) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 39 Assistant Town Planner Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official MPPSC website. The last date to submit the application form is 31-07-2026. In this article, you’ll find the MPPSC Assistant Town Planner Posts recruitment details, including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, selection process, application steps, and direct links to the official notification and Online application form.

application_fee.details: Fee details available in Appendix-3 (not specified in text pages; payment via Credit/Debit Card, Net Banking, or MP Online Kiosk cash) Late fee: ₹3000 (20.03.2026 to 26.03.2026) / ₹25000 (27.03.2026 to 26.08.2026)

age_limit.details: Minimum: 21 years completed Maximum: 40 years not completed Age relaxation as per Appendix-1 (not detailed in provided pages)

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree (4 years) in Planning OR Master's degree (M.Plan) in specified fields OR A.I.T.P. exam passed
qualification.details: Qualification: Bachelor's degree (4 years duration) in Planning from a recognized institution OR Postgraduate degree (M.Plan) in Town Planning / Urban Planning / City Planning / Housing Planning / Rural Planning / Infrastructure Planning / Regional Planning / Traffic & Transportation Planning / Landscape Architecture / Urban Design / Environmental Planning from a recognized institution OR Passed A.I.T.P. examination. B.E. or M.E. in Traffic & Transportation not acceptable.

salary_details.details: Pay Scale: 56100 - 177500 (Rajpatrit Dwitiya Shreni / Gazetted Second Class)

selection_process: OMR-based Objective Written Exam (Negative Marking applicable) Shortlisting: 3 times vacancies (category-wise) based on written exam marks Interview Final Merit: Written Exam + Interview marks
how_to_apply: Pay fee online or via MP Online kiosk
Correct errors (if any) in correction window
Ensure eligibility completed by last date
important_instructions: Age calculated as on 01 January 2027 (based on High School marksheet) MP domicile required for reserved categories Employment registration requirements for MP residents (exemptions for serving candidates) Two-child norm applicable (exceptions as per rules) Application only online; corrections during window with ₹50 per error Exam at Indore centres OBC reservation provisional (87% main + 13% backlog) subject to court decisions

content_sections.heading: MPPSC Assistant Town Planner Recruitment 2026 Overview

rows.madhya_pradesh_public_service_commission: Bachelor's degree (4 years) in Planning OR Master's degree (M.Plan) in specified fields OR A.I.T.P. exam passed

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Qualification: Bachelor's degree (4 years duration) in Planning from a recognized institution OR Postgraduate degree (M.Plan) in Town Planning / Urban Planning / City Planning / Housing Planning / Rural Planning / Infrastructure Planning / Regional Planning / Traffic & Transportation Planning / Landscape Architecture / Urban Design / Environmental Planning from a recognized institution OR Passed A.I.T.P. examination. B.E. or M.E. in Traffic & Transportation not acceptable.

content_sections.heading: Salary/ Stipend
content_sections.text: Pay Scale: 56100 - 177500 (Rajpatrit Dwitiya Shreni / Gazetted Second Class)

content_sections.heading: Age Limit (as on 01 January 2027)
content_sections.text: Minimum: 21 years completed Maximum: 40 years not completed Age relaxation as per Appendix-1 (not detailed in provided pages)

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Fee details available in Appendix-3 (not specified in text pages; payment via Credit/Debit Card, Net Banking, or MP Online Kiosk cash) Late fee: ₹3000 (20.03.2026 to 26.03.2026) / ₹25000 (27.03.2026 to 26.08.2026)

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: OMR-based Objective Written Exam (Negative Marking applicable) Shortlisting: 3 times vacancies (category-wise) based on written exam marks Interview Final Merit: Written Exam + Interview marks

content_sections.heading: General Information/ Instructions
content_sections.text: Age calculated as on 01 January 2027 (based on High School marksheet) MP domicile required for reserved categories Employment registration requirements for MP residents (exemptions for serving candidates) Two-child norm applicable (exceptions as per rules) Application only online; corrections during window with ₹50 per error Exam at Indore centres OBC reservation provisional (87% main + 13% backlog) subject to court decisions

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Apply online only at www.mppsc.mp.gov.in Submit between 01 July 2026 and 31 July 2026 Pay fee online or via MP Online kiosk Correct errors (if any) in correction window Ensure eligibility completed by last date

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MPPSC Assistant Town Planner 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online applications without late fee is 31 July 2026 (midnight). Late applications accepted with fees until August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in MPPSC Assistant Town Planner Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Total 39 vacancies (UR 10, SC 6, ST 8, OBC 11, EWS 4) including horizontal reservations for women and PwD.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Assistant Town Planner in MPPSC?
faq.answer: Bachelor's in Planning (4 years) OR M.Plan in relevant specialization OR passed A.I.T.P. exam. Traffic/Transportation B.E./M.E. not valid.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for MPPSC Assistant Town Planner 2026?
faq.answer: Minimum 21 years and maximum 40 years as on 01 January 2027. Relaxations apply as per rules.

faq.question: Q5. When is the written exam for MPPSC Assistant Town Planner 2026?
faq.answer: The OMR-based objective exam is scheduled for 20 September 2026 at Indore centres.
